candidates.why: Generic revenue label but less clearly the consolidated top-line than explicit total
Explicit consolidated top-line revenue figure; matches REVT definition best

candidates.row_label: Value addition/gains on sales of financial instruments
candidates.why: Financial gains, not operating revenue; should not be used for REVT
Component/secondary revenue, but there is an explicit total revenue line available
Alternate revenue wording but ambiguous; explicit Total Revenue is clearer for REVT
Technical balancing line, not the clean reported top-line total

variables.notes: Total Revenue is the explicit top-line sales figure and is appropriate for REVT.

candidates.why: Direct costs for subcontracted work; clearly part of cost of sales for a construction/contracting business
Direct material costs; another clear component of cost of goods/services sold

variables.notes: Both Subcontractors and Cost of materials are direct production/service costs and should be included in COGS.

candidates.why: Overhead personnel costs; classic SG&A component and not labeled as COGS
Likely personnel-related overhead but appears to be unused/empty in the preview; less central than the main Personnel expenses line
Bucket of operating overhead separate from direct cost lines; best available generic SG&A-type bucket and not a total containing the word Total

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A line is provided; use the main overhead buckets Personnel expenses and Operating expenses, excluding totals and D&A/impairment lines.
No R&D-related candidate rows are present; treat XRD as zero.

candidates.why: Core interest expense line within financial costs; best match for XINT
Interest component of lease liabilities; part of interest but more specific; prefer the broader Interest Expenses line for XINT
Represents allocation of net income, not interest expense
Duplicate concept of non-controlling interests, not interest expense
Supplementary/memo line with no values in preview; primary P&L interest line is Interest Expenses

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; more granular than needed for the main XINT
Asset account for receivables, not an income statement interest expense
Equity for minority shareholders, not interest expense
Equity for minority shareholders, not interest expense

variables.notes: Use the main P&L interest expense line Interest Expenses for XINT; lease interest and supplemental lines are excluded.

candidates.why: Represents net income attributable to equity holders, not the stock of equity on the balance sheet

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income attributable to Equity holders of Veidekke ASA
candidates.why: Flow measure (comprehensive income), not balance sheet equity
Component of equity but not the total; prefer a total equity line for BE
Label suggests a component, and appears unused in preview; less clear than Total Equity
Explicit total shareholders’ equity excluding non-controlling interests; best representation of book equity for owners
Total equity including minority interests; slightly less precise for common shareholders’ book equity than Total Equity

variables.notes: Total Equity on the balance sheet is the clean shareholders’ equity figure (excluding minorities) and is used for BE.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit to non-controlling interests; not the equity stock but indicates presence of minorities
Duplicate of non-controlling interests on the income statement; again a flow allocation, not the balance sheet amount
Balance sheet line representing the equity attributable to non-controlling interests
Duplicate naming of the same balance sheet minority equity; values match Non-controlling interests

variables.notes: Use the balance sheet Minority Interest line for MIB, as it represents the stock of non-controlling equity; the income statement lines are allocations of profit, not the equity amount.
